arts.ttl: Swansea City in line for injury boost for Leeds United showdown
arts.sum: Luke Williams does not have any fresh problems ahead of his side welcoming Leeds United to South Wales on Sunday. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: “A quote from Brian Clough” - Daniel Farke addresses ‘important’ Leeds United issue - LeedsAllOver
arts.sum: “We had a good team on paper, but unfortunately the game was played on grass” is a quote from brief Leeds United manager Brian Clough, and it’s one that resonates with Farke. Brian Clough’s name doesn’t come with much positive talk in Leeds United circles, but Daniel Farke has referenced the late manager when discussing a key topic in the Whites’ promotion race.

arts.ttl: Leeds United are a fabulous team and will finish in top two - but we can shock them - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Swansea City boss Luke Williams is a huge admirer of what Daniel Farke is building at Elland Road and knows his side face a huge challenge in Sunday's Championship clash between the two sides at the Liberty Stadium. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Leeds United given 'tough old task' prediction for Swansea City challenge
arts.sum: Leeds United's fixture against Swansea City on Sunday afternoon is 'one to keep an eye on'. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Leeds United should be incredibly jealous of Middlesbrough after major transfer development
arts.sum: Leeds United looked to land an attacking loan signing in August and brought in Manor Solomon from Tottenham, but are yet to see their produce anything meanwhile, as Middlesbrough reap the benefits of a youthful gamble in Liverpool’s Ben Doak . Another winger joining a Championship promotion hopeful on loan this season was Liverpool’s Ben Doak moving to Michael Carrick’s Middlesbrough.

arts.ttl: Leeds United line-up vs Swansea as the axe falls on two starters for long trip
arts.sum: Nearly two weeks have passed since Leeds United last played and it’s been easy to forget there were three changes in that game from Daniel Farke. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Leeds United would still be a PL club if Orta did one thing, he’s now admitted how bad his mistake was
arts.sum: Leeds United’s former sporting director Victor Orta has shared how he turned down a chance to sign striker Viktor Gyokeres for a mere £11.7million fee. Having been strongly linked with a move to Leeds at the time, Orta has now revealed after the fact that he turned down the chance to bring in Gyokeres for just £11.7million, as he spoke at the Liga Portugal Business School, via Record, about this comical transfer blunder:

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke issues positive Ethan Ampadu update as Leeds United captain in 'final stages'
arts.sum: Leeds United captain Ethan Ampadu is closing in on a return to training as he continues to recover from a knee ligament injury. Speaking last week to BBC Radio Leeds, the former Chelsea youngster gave an update on his injury and revealed that he and Gruev have helped each other throughout the rehab.

arts.ttl: Leeds United make “audacious bid” to sign Premier League midfielder with 61 goals & 37 assists
arts.sum: Leeds United are reportedly eyeing Manchester City midfielder James McAtee, with an ambitious plan to bring the highly-rated 22-year-old to Elland Road during the January transfer window. Renowned for his exceptional technical skills and creative flair, McAtee has caught the attention of multiple clubs. arts.ttl: Leeds team news: Farke “concerned” with Wöber
arts.sum: Leeds United centre-back Max Wöber has missed a large portion of the season so far with knee issues, but returned to action with Austria in this month’s international break. Swansea City await for Leeds this Sunday in the Championship, and the extended period between the international break and a return to league action is a relief for Daniel Farke.
